JSyn - Java Audio Synthesis

Miscellaneous Features

  • Signals can be mixed using the N by M SynthMixer class, or using a summing SynthBus.
  • Units can be combined into SynthCircuits which may be treated like a single unit.
  • Lower level 'C' API is secure against over-indexing to ensure safe use with Java.
  • JSyn passes unit tokens back to Java instead of pointers.
  • Resources keep a reference count. Deletion is deferred until count goes to zero.
  • Synth.sleepUntilTime( time ) preserves absolute timing, does not drift.
